zh.lifeSummary: 當Eberhard II. von Hengebach於大約1155年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫海巴賀時，他的父親Eberhard I von Heimbach24歲，母親Mädchen22歲。他和Jutta von Jülich至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1217年在他的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eberhard II. von Hengebach于大约1155年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫海巴賀时，他的父亲Eberhard I von Heimbach24岁，母亲Mädchen22岁。他和Jutta von Jülich至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1217年在他的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hengebach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Hengsbach, a habitational name from a farm near Siegen, North Rhine-Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Eberhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Eberhard II. von Hengebach was born about 1155, in Heimbach, Düren, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Eberhard I von Heimbach, was 24 and his mother, Mädchen, was 22. He had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Jutta von Jülich. He died in 1217, in his hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eberhard II. von Hengebach est né environ 1155, à Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Eberhard I von Heimbach, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mädchen, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Jutta von Jülich. Il est décédé en 1217, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eberhard II. von Hengebach um 1155 in Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eberhard I von Heimbach 24 und seine Mutter Mädchen 22. Er hatte mit Jutta von Jülich mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1217 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eberhard II. von Hengebach è nato il circa 1155 nel Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Eberhard I von Heimbach, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mädchen, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Jutta von Jülich. Morì nel 1217, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eberhard II. von Hengebachが約1155年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンドuレンヘインバチで生まれた時，父Eberhard I von Heimbachは24歳，母Mädchenは22歳であった。彼はJutta von Jülichとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1217年に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eberhard II. von Hengebach(이)가 대략 1155년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 드u런 하임바치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eberhard I von Heimbach(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mädchen(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Jutta von Jülich(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eberhard II. von Hengebach nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Eberhard I von Heimbach, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mädchen, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Jutta von Jülich. Ele faleceu em 1217, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eberhard II. von Hengebach родился около 1155 г. в местности химбач, дuрен, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Eberhard I von Heimbach было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mädchen, 22. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Jutta von Jülich. Он умер в 1217 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eberhard II. von Hengebach nació aproximadamente 1155, en Heimbach, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Eberhard I von Heimbach, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mädchen, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Jutta von Jülich. Murió en 1217, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
